about_us_welcome_title: Al Mekhtar: The Future of Property
about_us_welcome_body: Your trusted partner in finding the perfect home or investment. We are dedicated to making property transactions transparent, efficient, and tailored to your unique needs across the region.
about_us_mission_body: To empower every user with innovative tools and accurate data, transforming the often-complex process of buying, selling, or renting property into a simple, confident experience.
about_us_vision_body: To be the leading digital property platform, recognized for our commitment to trust, technological excellence, and fostering a seamless connection between properties and people.
create_acc_heading: Enter your credentials to start the experience!
payment_error_msg: Missing required booking or card details.
card_not_added: Please add a card before confirming the booking.
booking_terms:
Dear Guest,

By making a payment and confirming your booking, you agree that if you cancel your reservation more than 3 days before the start date, you will receive a full refund. For cancellations made within 3 days of the start date, 90% of the payment will be refunded.

We wish you a pleasant stay!
check_date: Make sure to check your date before making any sort of payments
booking_cancel_error: Failed to cancel booking . Please try again.
empty_search: No properties found matching your filters.
delete_property_confirmation: Do you confirm to delete this property from the system
action_cannot_be_undone: Note that this action cannot be undone!
cancel_booking_confirmation_body:
are you sure to cancel?
Note that if you cancel within three days of duration, you wont get refunded
deleted_property_place_holder: This property is no longer available or has been removed by the owner.
payment_terms:
By using this card, you confirm that it belongs to you personally.
In the event of a booking cancellation or a failed transaction for any reason, the refunded amount may be returned to one of the payment cards saved in your account within the application.
